productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Boys Check Navy Blue Shirt
description: Style NoteMake your own casual fashion rules with this navy blue and white checked shirt from united colors of benetton. The checked look lends an exciting and diverse casual style which boys will love, while the cotton fabric will keep him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear.Product DetailsNavy blue and white checked shirt, has a spread collar, short sleeves, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned closures, full buttoned placket, slightly distressed graphic print on the back and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorations
